predictedBugs: validate_cnpj calls sys.exit(1) which pytest catches as SystemExit — test must use pytest.raises(SystemExit) or test will abort
gate1_cobertura and gate2_cadastral print to stdout via ANSI helpers — output is visual, not functional; tests validate return value not stdout
_fmt_duration for values between 60-120 seconds: int() truncation could produce wrong minutes (e.g., 119s -> 1m59s vs 1m59s)
edgeCases: Empty editais list in gate1_cobertura should return passed=False with Zero editais issue
CNPJ with non-ASCII digits (e.g., Arabic-Indic numerals) in validate_cnpj
validate_ufs with mixed case and extra whitespace should normalize correctly
